_comment: Last confirmed working versions for each service.
_usage: Referenced in each service tab's Maintenance pane. Update this file whenever you confirm a version works after an update — not every time you update. The goal is a known-good baseline to roll back to.
_format: Each key matches the service id from services.json. Fields: version, checkedDate, notes.
_howto: After updating a service and confirming everything still works (SSO login, basic functionality), update the entry here with today's date.

jellyfin.notes: Always verify SSO-Auth plugin compatibility before updating Jellyfin. Plugin may lag behind major releases.

immich.notes: Docker image version. Immich updates frequently — check release notes before updating.

kavita-dnd.notes: Same binary as kavita-comics, just a second instance.

nextcloud.notes: XAMPP-based. Only update via the built-in updater, never manually replace files.

authentik.notes: Critical infrastructure. Test ALL service SSO logins after updating. Docker image version.

ollama.notes: Model versions are separate from the engine version. Engine updates are safe; model updates may change output behaviour.

excalidraw.notes: Docker image version. Stateless so updates are low-risk.

readeck.notes: Docker image version. Per-user instances — update all containers together.

foundry.notes: Licensed software. Check Foundry's own update notes — world/module compatibility can break on major versions.
